description:
In SketchUp Make 2017, model a residential gable-roofed building with a shed dormer on the south-facing roof slope, then design a solar panel installation using the Skelion plugin.

Building Specifications:
- Footprint: 40 feet (east-west along red axis) × 28 feet (north-south along green axis)
- Origin at the southwest corner
- Wall height: 9 feet
- Gable roof with a 7:12 pitch, ridge running east-west along the center

Shed Dormer Specifications (on the south-facing roof slope):
- Width: 12 feet, centered along the east-west length (from 14 ft to 26 ft)
- Face wall height: 5 feet above the roof surface where it meets the roof
- Shed roof (flat or low-slope, sloping back toward main ridge)
- Extends from ~4 feet above the eave line up toward the ridge

Solar Panel Specifications:
- Use Skelion plugin
- Dimensions: ~1650 mm × 992 mm (landscape orientation)
- Mounting: Flush mount (0° additional tilt)
- Place panels on the south-facing roof slope around the dormer (left, right, and below as space permits)
- Do NOT place panels on the dormer roof itself or on the north-facing slope
- Maintain at least a 1-foot clearance from all roof edges and dormer walls

Save the completed model to: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\dormer_solar_project.skp
